block_03: A new report by the International Energy Agency recognizes Tesla's efforts to drive the transition to sustainable energy. The report outlines a roadmap for achieving net-zero carbon emissions by 2050, with recommendations for investing in renewable energy and transitioning to electric vehicles. Tesla's focus on developing innovative clean energy solutions highlights its commitment to a more sustainable future.
block_07: Continental AG shares are gaining momentum as investors react positively to the company's strong 2022 financial performance. Despite supply chain disruptions, Continental remains confident in its ability to sustain growth and profitability in the coming years. The share price rose almost by 12% this week.))
block_10: Internet search provider Baidu, which also offers online marketing services to its customers, witnessed its current year earnings increasing 5.6% over the last 60 days.  Despite this, the share price has fallen by 13% in one week.
